_about: LCP (Liquidity Crisis Predictor) tunable thresholds. Read by references/risk-model.md. Edit only if you have empirical justification; defaults are conservative for Pharos Atlantic testnet.

reserve_depth.description: Normalized depth of the primary liquidity pool, in USD-equivalent (post-decimal scaling).

outflow_velocity.description: Net ERC-20 Transfer volume out of the top 10 holders over the last WINDOW_BLOCKS, normalized by totalSupply.

holder_concentration.description: Share of totalSupply held by the single largest holder (H1).

pool_imbalance.description: Absolute deviation of the pool's reserve ratio from 50/50 (or its design ratio).

gas_stress.description: Current gas price relative to a 5000-block rolling median.

liquidity_age.description: Blocks since the pool's first AddLiquidity event (younger = riskier).

supply_growth.description: Relative change in totalSupply over the last WINDOW_BLOCKS (mint pressure).

crisis_probability.description: Logistic mapping from raw score to P(crisis in next ~24h). Calibrated conservatively for testnet.

disclaimer: LCP is an informational on-chain analytics signal. It is not financial advice. On-chain conditions can change between the read and any subsequent action.
